---
title: "TidyTuesday 2026 Week 19: Twinned Cities"
subtitle: "City-to-city links across countries and continents"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
#| label: prepare-sankey-data
#| include: false
data_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-05-12"
data_processed_dir <- here::here("data", "processed", "2026")

fs::dir_create(data_processed_dir)

cities <- readr::read_csv(
  stringr::str_c(data_url, "/cities.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  janitor::clean_names()

links <- readr::read_csv(
  stringr::str_c(data_url, "/links.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  janitor::clean_names()

city_lookup <- cities |>
  dplyr::distinct(id, .keep_all = TRUE)

source_cities <- city_lookup |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    source = id,
    source_name = name,
    source_country = country,
    source_continent = continent
  )

target_cities <- city_lookup |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    target = id,
    target_name = name,
    target_country = country,
    target_continent = continent
  )

link_locations <- links |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    source_cities,
    by = dplyr::join_by(source),
    relationship = "many-to-one"
  ) |>
  dplyr::inner_join(
    target_cities,
    by = dplyr::join_by(target),
    relationship = "many-to-one"
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(
    !is.na(source_name),
    !is.na(target_name),
    !is.na(source_country),
    !is.na(target_country)
  )

india_links <- link_locations |>
  dplyr::filter(source_country == "India" | target_country == "India")

india_sankey_links <- india_links |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    india_city = dplyr::if_else(source_country == "India", source_name, target_name),
    linked_country = dplyr::if_else(source_country == "India", target_country, source_country),
    linked_city = dplyr::if_else(source_country == "India", target_name, source_name),
    linked_continent = dplyr::if_else(source_country == "India", target_continent, source_continent)
  ) |>
  dplyr::count(
    india_city,
    linked_country,
    linked_city,
    linked_continent,
    name = "link_count",
    sort = TRUE
  )

readr::write_csv(
  india_sankey_links,
  fs::path(data_processed_dir, "tt_2026_w19_india_sankey_links.csv")
)
```

```{=html}
<style>
  @import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap");

  .india-sankey-wrap {
    font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
    margin: 1.5rem auto 2.5rem;
    max-width: 1360px;
    padding: 0 1rem;
  }

  .india-sankey-sidebar {
    padding: clamp(2.1rem, 3vw, 3rem) 1.15rem 2rem 0;
  }

  .india-sankey-title {
    margin: 0;
    color: #11171c;
    font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
    font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 3.15vw, 3.65rem);
    line-height: 1.02;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 0;
  }

  .india-sankey-selected-city {
    margin: 1.55rem 0 0.65rem;
    color: #e75480;
    font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.15vw, 2.05rem);
    line-height: 1.05;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .india-sankey-selected-city.is-muted {
    color: #52616b;
  }

  .india-sankey-subtitle {
    max-width: 31ch;
    margin: 0;
    color: #11171c;
    font-size: 0.96rem;
    line-height: 1.32;
  }

  .india-sankey-panel {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(215px, 0.25fr) minmax(0, 1fr);
    gap: 1.1rem;
    align-items: start;
    border: 1px solid #dce3e8;
    border-radius: 8px;
    background: #f8fafb;
    overflow: hidden;
    padding: 0 1rem 0.75rem 1.55rem;
  }

  .india-sankey-chart {
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .india-sankey-chart svg {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
  }

  .india-sankey-node rect {
    shape-rendering: crispEdges;
  }

  .india-sankey-node text {
    fill: #11171c;
    font-family: "Manrope", sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    pointer-events: none;
  }

  .india-sankey-link {
    fill: none;
    mix-blend-mode: multiply;
    transition: opacity 140ms ease;
  }

  .india-sankey-meta {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.75rem 1.1rem;
    margin: 1.25rem 0 0;
    color: #52616b;
    font-size: 0.86rem;
  }

  .india-sankey-meta strong {
    color: #11171c;
  }

  @media (max-width: 880px) {
    .india-sankey-panel {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      gap: 1.25rem;
      padding: 1.25rem;
    }

    .india-sankey-sidebar {
      padding-top: 0;
    }
  }

</style>
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

indiaSankeyRaw = FileAttachment("../../data/processed/2026/tt_2026_w19_india_sankey_links.csv").csv({typed: true})

indiaSankeyRows = indiaSankeyRaw
  .map(d => ({
    india_city: d.india_city,
    linked_country: d.linked_country,
    linked_city: d.linked_city,
    linked_continent: d.linked_continent,
    link_count: +d.link_count
  }))
  .filter(d =>
    d.india_city &&
    d.linked_country &&
    d.linked_city &&
    Number.isFinite(d.link_count) &&
    d.link_count > 0
  )

indiaCityChoices = [
  "All Indian cities",
  ...Array.from(new Set(indiaSankeyRows.map(d => d.india_city))).sort(d3.ascending)
]

sankeyHighlightPink = "#e75480"
sankeyLinkGray = "#b8c1c8"
sankeyNodeGray = "#9aa6ad"
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof selectedIndiaCity = Inputs.select(
  indiaCityChoices,
  {
    label: "Indian city",
    value: "All Indian cities"
  }
)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

selectedIndiaSankeyRows = selectedIndiaCity === "All Indian cities"
  ? []
  : indiaSankeyRows.filter(d => d.india_city === selectedIndiaCity)
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

d3Sankey = require("d3-sankey@0.12.3")
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

{
  const margin = {top: 34, right: 270, bottom: 12, left: 180};
  const width = 1180;
  const sankeyRows = indiaSankeyRows;
  const highlightedCity = selectedIndiaCity === "All Indian cities" ? null : selectedIndiaCity;
  const highlightedNodeIds = new Set();
  const height = Math.max(860, Math.min(1460, 430 + sankeyRows.length * 9.5));
  const innerWidth = width - margin.left - margin.right;
  const innerHeight = height - margin.top - margin.bottom;

  const cityTotals = d3.rollup(
    sankeyRows,
    values => d3.sum(values, d => d.link_count),
    d => d.india_city
  );

  const countryTotals = d3.rollup(
    sankeyRows,
    values => d3.sum(values, d => d.link_count),
    d => d.linked_country
  );

  const nodesById = new Map();
  const addNode = node => {
    if (!nodesById.has(node.id)) nodesById.set(node.id, node);
  };

  for (const row of sankeyRows) {
    if (row.india_city === highlightedCity) {
      highlightedNodeIds.add(`india:${row.india_city}`);
      highlightedNodeIds.add(`country:${row.linked_country}`);
      highlightedNodeIds.add(`linked:${row.linked_city}|${row.linked_country}`);
    }

    addNode({
      id: `india:${row.india_city}`,
      name: row.india_city,
      stage: "Indian city",
      kind: "india",
      colorKey: row.india_city,
      sortValue: cityTotals.get(row.india_city) ?? 0
    });
    addNode({
      id: `country:${row.linked_country}`,
      name: row.linked_country,
      stage: "Linked country",
      kind: "country",
      continent: row.linked_continent,
      sortValue: countryTotals.get(row.linked_country) ?? 0
    });
    addNode({
      id: `linked:${row.linked_city}|${row.linked_country}`,
      name: row.linked_city,
      stage: "Linked city",
      kind: "linked",
      country: row.linked_country,
      continent: row.linked_continent,
      sortValue: row.link_count
    });
  }

  const cityCountryLinks = Array.from(
    d3.rollup(
      sankeyRows,
      values => ({
        value: d3.sum(values, d => d.link_count),
        continent: values[0].linked_continent,
        targetName: values[0].linked_country
      }),
      d => d.india_city,
      d => d.linked_country
    ),
    ([city, countries]) => Array.from(countries, ([country, details]) => ({
      source: `india:${city}`,
      target: `country:${country}`,
      sourceName: city,
      targetName: details.targetName,
      value: details.value,
      continent: details.continent,
      colorKey: city
    }))
  ).flat();

  const countryCityLinks = sankeyRows.map(row => ({
    source: `country:${row.linked_country}`,
    target: `linked:${row.linked_city}|${row.linked_country}`,
    sourceName: row.linked_country,
    targetName: row.linked_city,
    value: row.link_count,
    continent: row.linked_continent,
    colorKey: row.india_city
  }));

  const graph = {
    nodes: Array.from(nodesById.values()).map(d => ({...d})),
    links: [...cityCountryLinks, ...countryCityLinks].map(d => ({...d}))
  };

  const sankey = d3Sankey.sankey()
    .nodeId(d => d.id)
    .nodeWidth(14)
    .nodePadding(5)
    .nodeAlign(d3Sankey.sankeyJustify)
    .nodeSort((a, b) =>
      d3.descending(a.sortValue, b.sortValue) ||
      d3.ascending(a.name, b.name)
    )
    .extent([[margin.left, margin.top], [margin.left + innerWidth, margin.top + innerHeight]]);

  sankey(graph);

  const activeLink = d => highlightedCity !== null && d.colorKey === highlightedCity;
  const activeNode = d => highlightedNodeIds.has(d.id);
  const baseLinkOpacity = highlightedCity === null ? 0.3 : 0.12;
  const activeLinkOpacity = 0.82;

  const totalLinks = d3.sum(selectedIndiaSankeyRows, d => d.link_count) || d3.sum(sankeyRows, d => d.link_count);
  const indianCityCount = new Set(selectedIndiaSankeyRows.map(d => d.india_city)).size || new Set(sankeyRows.map(d => d.india_city)).size;
  const linkedCountryCount = new Set(selectedIndiaSankeyRows.map(d => d.linked_country)).size || new Set(sankeyRows.map(d => d.linked_country)).size;
  const linkedCityCount = new Set(selectedIndiaSankeyRows.map(d => `${d.linked_city}|${d.linked_country}`)).size || new Set(sankeyRows.map(d => `${d.linked_city}|${d.linked_country}`)).size;
  const cityLabel = highlightedCity ?? "Select a city";
  const cityClass = highlightedCity === null
    ? "india-sankey-selected-city is-muted"
    : "india-sankey-selected-city";
  const formatList = values => values.length > 1
    ? `${values.slice(0, -1).join(", ")} and ${values[values.length - 1]}`
    : values[0];
  const topOverallCities = Array.from(cityTotals, ([city, value]) => ({city, value}))
    .sort((a, b) => d3.descending(a.value, b.value))
    .slice(0, 3)
    .map(d => d.city);
  const topOverallCountries = Array.from(countryTotals, ([country, value]) => ({country, value}))
    .sort((a, b) => d3.descending(a.value, b.value))
    .slice(0, 3)
    .map(d => d.country);
  const selectedCountryTotals = d3.rollup(
    selectedIndiaSankeyRows,
    values => d3.sum(values, d => d.link_count),
    d => d.linked_country
  );
  const topSelectedCountries = Array.from(selectedCountryTotals, ([country, value]) => ({country, value}))
    .sort((a, b) => d3.descending(a.value, b.value))
    .slice(0, 3)
    .map(d => d.country);
  const sidebarText = highlightedCity === null
    ? `${formatList(topOverallCities)} anchor the densest Indian sister-city network, with links concentrating through ${formatList(topOverallCountries)} before spreading to linked cities abroad.`
    : `${highlightedCity}'s sister-city ties lean most toward ${formatList(topSelectedCountries)}.`;

  const wrapper = html`<section class="india-sankey-wrap">
    <div class="india-sankey-panel">
      <div class="india-sankey-sidebar">
        <h2 class="india-sankey-title">India's<br>Twin City Ties</h2>
        <div class="${cityClass}">${cityLabel}</div>
        <p class="india-sankey-subtitle">${sidebarText}</p>
        <div class="india-sankey-meta">
          <span><strong>${d3.format(",")(totalLinks)}</strong> links</span>
          <span><strong>${d3.format(",")(indianCityCount)}</strong> Indian cities</span>
          <span><strong>${d3.format(",")(linkedCountryCount)}</strong> linked countries</span>
          <span><strong>${d3.format(",")(linkedCityCount)}</strong> linked cities</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="india-sankey-chart"></div>
    </div>
  </section>`;

  const panel = wrapper.querySelector(".india-sankey-chart");
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", [0, 0, width, height])
    .attr("role", "img")
    .attr("aria-label", "Interactive Sankey diagram of Indian twin-city links");

  svg.append("g")
    .attr("font-family", "Manrope, sans-serif")
    .attr("font-size", 12)
    .selectAll("text")
    .data([
      {label: "Indian city", x: margin.left, anchor: "start"},
      {label: "Linked country", x: margin.left + innerWidth / 2, anchor: "middle"},
      {label: "Linked city", x: margin.left + innerWidth, anchor: "end"}
    ])
    .join("text")
    .attr("x", d => d.x)
    .attr("y", 16)
    .attr("text-anchor", d => d.anchor)
    .attr("fill", "#52616b")
    .attr("font-weight", 800)
    .attr("letter-spacing", 0.8)
    .attr("text-transform", "uppercase")
    .text(d => d.label);

  const link = svg.append("g")
    .attr("fill", "none")
    .selectAll("path")
    .data(graph.links)
    .join("path")
    .attr("class", "india-sankey-link")
    .attr("d", d3Sankey.sankeyLinkHorizontal())
    .attr("stroke", d => activeLink(d) ? sankeyHighlightPink : sankeyLinkGray)
    .attr("stroke-opacity", d => activeLink(d) ? activeLinkOpacity : baseLinkOpacity)
    .attr("stroke-width", d => Math.max(1, d.width));

  link.append("title")
    .text(d => `${d.sourceName} -> ${d.targetName}: ${d.value} ${d.value === 1 ? "link" : "links"}`);

  link
    .on("mouseenter", function() {
      link.attr("stroke-opacity", d => activeLink(d) ? 0.42 : 0.08);
      d3.select(this).attr("stroke-opacity", 0.78);
    })
    .on("mouseleave", () => link.attr("stroke-opacity", d => activeLink(d) ? activeLinkOpacity : baseLinkOpacity));

  const node = svg.append("g")
    .selectAll("g")
    .data(graph.nodes)
    .join("g")
    .attr("class", "india-sankey-node");

  node.append("rect")
    .attr("x", d => d.x0)
    .attr("y", d => d.y0)
    .attr("height", d => Math.max(1, d.y1 - d.y0))
    .attr("width", d => d.x1 - d.x0)
    .attr("rx", 2)
    .attr("fill", d => activeNode(d) ? sankeyHighlightPink : sankeyNodeGray)
    .attr("fill-opacity", d => highlightedCity === null || activeNode(d) ? 0.95 : 0.42)
    .attr("stroke", "#11171c")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", d => activeNode(d) ? 0.68 : 0.18);

  node.append("title")
    .text(d => {
      const suffix = d.kind === "linked" ? `, ${d.country}` : "";
      return `${d.name}${suffix}: ${d.value} ${d.value === 1 ? "link" : "links"}`;
    });

  node.append("text")
    .attr("x", d => {
      if (d.kind === "india") return d.x0 - 8;
      if (d.kind === "linked") return d.x1 + 8;
      return d.x1 + 8;
    })
    .attr("y", d => (d.y0 + d.y1) / 2)
    .attr("dy", "0.35em")
    .attr("text-anchor", d => d.kind === "india" ? "end" : "start")
    .text(d => d.name)
    .clone(true).lower()
    .attr("stroke", "#f8fafb")
    .attr("stroke-width", 4)
    .attr("stroke-linejoin", "round");

  panel.append(svg.node());

  return wrapper;
}
```
